subcodes.first_line: O leaf assured in faith, render thanks unto thy Lord for having guided thee to the straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه الموقنه اشکرى ربک بما هداک الى الصراط المستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
